question: Qual o valor líquido faturado total em 2026?
oracle_sql:
SELECT TOP 10
    c.TCustomer AS Cliente,
    SUM(f.NetAmount) AS ValorLiquidoFaturado
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
JOIN dbo.D_Customer c
    ON f.NIDPayerParty = c.NIDCustomer
WHERE f.BillingDocumentDate / 10000 = 2026
  AND f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 0
GROUP BY c.TCustomer
ORDER BY ValorLiquidoFaturado DESC;

question: Quais são os 10 produtos com maior quantidade faturada em 2026?

question: Quais são os 10 clientes com maior margem bruta em 2026 considerando apenas registos adicionais calculados?

    SUM(f.GrossMargin) AS MargemBruta
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
JOIN dbo.D_Customer c
    ON f.NIDPayerParty = c.NIDCustomer
WHERE f.BillingDocumentDate / 10000 = 2026
  AND f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 0
  AND f.IsItAnAdditionalCalculatedRecord = 1
GROUP BY c.TCustomer

question: Quais são as 10 marcas com maior desconto promocional total em 2026?
oracle_sql:
SELECT TOP 10
    pb.TProductBrand AS MarcaProduto,
    SUM(f.ZDPRPromotional + f.ZCPRPromotionalCampaign + f.REA1PromotionalDiscount) AS DescontoPromocionalTotal
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
JOIN dbo.D_Product p
    ON f.NIDProduct = p.NIDProduct
JOIN dbo.D_ProductBrand pb
    ON p.NIDProductBrand = pb.NIDProductBrand
WHERE f.BillingDocumentDate / 10000 = 2026
  AND f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 0
GROUP BY pb.TProductBrand
ORDER BY DescontoPromocionalTotal ASC;

question: Quais são os 10 clientes com maior número de documentos de faturação distintos em 2026?
oracle_sql:
SELECT TOP 10
    c.TCustomer AS Cliente,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f.BillingDocument) AS NumeroDocumentos
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
JOIN dbo.D_Customer c
    ON f.NIDPayerParty = c.NIDCustomer
WHERE f.BillingDocumentDate / 10000 = 2026
  AND f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 0
GROUP BY c.TCustomer
ORDER BY NumeroDocumentos DESC;

question: Quais são os 5 produtos com maior diferença entre preço de lista e valor líquido faturado em 2026?
oracle_sql:
SELECT TOP 5
    p.TProduct AS Produto,
    SUM(f.ZLP1PriceList) - SUM(f.NetAmount) AS DiferencaPrecoListaVsLiquido
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
JOIN dbo.D_Product p
    ON f.NIDProduct = p.NIDProduct
WHERE f.BillingDocumentDate / 10000 = 2026
  AND f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 0
GROUP BY p.TProduct
ORDER BY DiferencaPrecoListaVsLiquido DESC;

question: Quais são os 10 clientes com maior faturação nos últimos 12 meses?
oracle_sql:
SELECT TOP 10
    c.TCustomer AS Cliente,
    SUM(f.NetAmount) AS ValorLiquidoFaturado
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
JOIN dbo.D_Customer c
    ON f.NIDPayerParty = c.NIDCustomer
WHERE f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 0
  AND f.BillingDocumentDate >= CONVERT(int, CONVERT(char(8), DATEADD(day, 1, EOMONTH(GETDATE(), -12)), 112))
GROUP BY c.TCustomer
ORDER BY ValorLiquidoFaturado DESC;

question: Quais são os 20 produtos com maior preço médio líquido por unidade nos últimos 12 meses?
oracle_sql:
SELECT TOP 20
    p.TProduct AS Produto,
    SUM(f.NetAmount) AS ValorLiquidoFaturado,
    SUM(f.BillingQuantity) AS QuantidadeFaturada,
    SUM(f.NetAmount) / NULLIF(SUM(f.BillingQuantity), 0) AS PrecoMedioLiquidoUnitario
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
JOIN dbo.D_Product p
    ON f.NIDProduct = p.NIDProduct
WHERE f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 0
  AND f.BillingDocumentDate >= CONVERT(int, CONVERT(char(8), DATEADD(day, 1, EOMONTH(GETDATE(), -12)), 112))
GROUP BY p.TProduct
HAVING SUM(f.BillingQuantity) <> 0
ORDER BY PrecoMedioLiquidoUnitario DESC;

question: Quais são os 10 clientes com maior margem bruta no ano atual?
oracle_sql:
SELECT TOP 10
    c.TCustomer AS Cliente,
    SUM(f.GrossMargin) AS MargemBruta
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
JOIN dbo.D_Customer c
    ON f.NIDPayerParty = c.NIDCustomer
WHERE f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 0
  AND f.IsItAnAdditionalCalculatedRecord = 1
  AND f.BillingDocumentDate / 10000 = YEAR(GETDATE())
GROUP BY c.TCustomer
ORDER BY MargemBruta DESC;
